debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
V PO W : Set (Set X)
hWV : W ⊆ V
hW : ∀ A ∈ V, ∃ B ∈ W, B ⊆ A
p : Player
S : Strategy (@chainTree X V) p
x : ↥S.pre.subtree
xs : List ↑V
A : ↑V
ys : ↥(Strategy.pre (@restrict X V W hWV hW p S)).subtree
⊢ ↑(@chainTree.concat X W ((Strategy.pre (@restrict X V W hWV hW p S)).subtree_incl ys) (@choose_pair X V W hW A) ⋯) ∈
    (Strategy.pre (@restrict X V W hWV hW p S)).subtree
